2218940.name: Mouseburg: Pursuit of Power
2218940.description:
Mouseburg, a bustling city full of busy citizens going about their daily routines: working, shopping, playing, and engaging in commerce. Six powerful houses are competing behind the scenes for control over the flow of cash and production in the city to advance their interests.

As the elections are approaching, each house sets its sights on the mayor’s seat. As one of the six candidates, you must gain enough influence to win the elections and make your house the most powerful in Mouseburg. But keep in mind, your rivals will stop at nothing to get ahead of you. Do you have what it takes to win?

Grow Your Business

The competition is tough. Opportunities come and go. To win in this game, you must expand your market dominance in a variety of ways—buy real estate or invest in company stock—and always stay ahead of your opponents.

Expand Your Influence

To win the elections, you must pull the right strings to win the approval of the Mouseburg citizens. Every resource you import must either serve your business venues or be invested in city projects that help you grow your influence. But keep in mind that resources are scarce, so use them wisely.

Experience a Story Campaign

Mouseburg is hardly a calm town resort. You will face conflict, deception, and malevolent external forces trying to exert their influence on the city. Your opponents all have skin in the game. They will smile in your face and conspire behind your back. It is up to you to pave the road for your house to dominate the city.

Features

  • A mix of strategic and tactical decisions

  • Multiple paths to victory

  • Story campaign with 11 unique scenarios

  • Free play mode with unique standalone scenarios and unlockable content
